# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects to prevent SSRF.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist expected hosts or domains before making outbound requests.
- Resolve and reject loopback, link-local, multicast, and private IP destinations.
- Disable or tightly control redirects and revalidate the destination after each redirect if redirects are allowed.
- Use network egress controls when available.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not fetch arbitrary user-provided URLs without validation.
- Do not allow access to internal addresses such as 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, or RFC1918/private ranges.
- Do not rely only on URL string format checks.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    protected $allowlist = [
        'example.com',
        'another-allowed-domain.com',
    ];

    public function fetchPreview(Request $request)
    {
        $url = $request->input('url');
        $host = parse_url($url, PHP_URL_HOST);

        if (!$this->isAllowedHost($host)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Host not allowed'], 403);
        }

        $ip = gethostbyname($host);

        if ($this->isPrivateIp($ip)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Access to private IP ranges is forbidden'], 403);
        }

        try {
            $response = Http::withOptions([
                'allow_redirects' => [
                    'max' => 3,
                    'strict' => true,
                    'referer' => true,
                    'track_redirects' => true,
                ],
            ])->get($url);

            $finalUrl = $response->effectiveUri();
            $finalHost = parse_url($finalUrl, PHP_URL_HOST);

            if (!$this->isAllowedHost($finalHost)) {
                return response()->json(['error' => 'Redirected to a non-allowed host'], 403);
            }

            return response()->json(['content' => $response->body()]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Failed to fetch URL'], 500);
        }
    }

    private function isAllowedHost($host)
    {
        return in_array($host, $this->allowlist);
    }

    private function isPrivateIp($ip)
    {
        return filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false;
    }
}
